'''pazhuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedarstrip|cedarstrip]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedarstrip|cedarstrip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pazhuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhizhith|pæzhizhith]] || [[word:pæzhizhij|pæzhizhij]] || [[word:pæzhizhish|pæzhizhish]] || [[word:pæzhizhi|pæzhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhuzhuzhuth|pazhuzhuzhuth]] || [[word:pazhuzhuzhuj|pazhuzhuzhuj]] || [[word:pazhuzhuzhush|pazhuzhuzhush]] || [[word:pazhuzhuzhu|pazhuzhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhuzhuth|pazhuzhuth]] || [[word:pazhuzhuj|pazhuzhuj]] || [[word:pazhuzhush|pazhuzhush]] || [[word:pazhuzhu|pazhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhufzhuth|pazhufzhuth]] || [[word:pazhufzhuj|pazhufzhuj]] || [[word:pazhufzhush|pazhufzhush]] || [[word:pazhufzhuf|pazhufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhuzhuthu|pazhuzhuthu]] || [[word:pazhuzhuju|pazhuzhuju]] || [[word:pazhuzhushu|pazhuzhushu]] || [[word:pazhuzhuku|pazhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhuzhuth|pazhuzhuth]] || [[word:pazhuzhuj|pazhuzhuj]] || [[word:pazhuzhush|pazhuzhush]] || [[word:pazhuzhu|pazhuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhuzhuthul|pazhuzhuthul]] || [[word:pazhuzhujul|pazhuzhujul]] || [[word:pazhuzhushul|pazhuzhushul]] || [[word:pazhuzhukul|pazhuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhuzhuthuthu|pazhuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:pazhuzhujuju|pazhuzhujuju]] || [[word:pazhuzhushushu|pazhuzhushushu]] || [[word:pazhuzhuku|pazhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhuzhuthun|pazhuzhuthun]] || [[word:pazhuzhujun|pazhuzhujun]] || [[word:pazhuzhushun|pazhuzhushun]] || [[word:pazhuzhukun|pazhuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhuzhuthuoro|pazhuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:pazhuzhujuoro|pazhuzhujuoro]] || [[word:pazhuzhushuoro|pazhuzhushuoro]] || [[word:pazhuzhukuoro|pazhuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
